mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json, seq_no, created_at FROM runtime_event WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY COALESCE(seq_no, 0) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json, seq_no, created_at FROM ( SELECT id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json, seq_no, created_at FROM runtime_event WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY COALESCE(seq_no, 0) DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) ORDER BY COALESCE(seq_no, 0) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_event (id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json, seq_no, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{eventType}, #{eventSource}, #{payloadJson}, #{seqNo}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, datetime('now')))
